subcodes.first_line: O Mahmud! Forget not God's grace upon thee, and fear no one, for verily He aideth whom He willeth through His command, which none can withstand [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا محمود لاتنس فضل الله علیک و لاتخف من احد انه ینصر من یشاء بامره لا راد
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement
